task_completion.description: Verify the publication year for the RNA interference paper is corrected.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Zotero UI, locate the paper on RNA interference (by Fire & Mello). The 'Date' or 'Year' field in the right-hand info pane or main list column must be set to 1998.

task_completion.description: Verify the publication years for the CRISPR-Cas9 and Cerebral organoids papers are corrected.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Zotero UI, locate the papers on CRISPR-Cas9 (Zhang lab) and Cerebral organoid technology (Lancaster et al.). The 'Date' or 'Year' field for both must be set to 2013.

task_completion.description: Verify the transposed author names are fixed for the Chromatin Remodeling and Insulin Signaling papers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Locate the papers 'Chromatin Remodeling Complexes and Gene Regulation' and the paper on insulin signaling. In the right-hand info pane, the author names must be correctly formatted with first names (Craig L. / Alan R.) and last names (Peterson / Saltiel) in their respective correct fields, not backwards.

task_completion.description: Verify the transposed author names are fixed for the MicroRNAs and Autophagy papers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Locate the papers 'The Role of MicroRNAs in Cancer Biology' and 'Autophagy: Cellular and Molecular Mechanisms'. The author names must be correctly formatted with first names (George A. / Noboru) and last names (Calin / Mizushima) in their respective correct fields.

task_completion.description: Verify placeholder abstracts are resolved for the Telomere Dynamics and Antibiotic Resistance papers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Locate the papers 'Telomere Dynamics and Cellular Senescence' and 'Mechanisms of Antibiotic Resistance in Gram-Negative Bacteria'. The 'Abstract' field in the info pane must either be completely empty or contain a genuine, plausible scientific abstract (it must NOT contain placeholder text like 'TODO', 'Placeholder', or gibberish).

task_completion.description: Verify placeholder abstracts are resolved for the Gut Microbiome, Immune Checkpoint, and Protein Structure papers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Locate the papers 'The Gut Microbiome and Human Health', 'Immune Checkpoint Blockade in Cancer Therapy', and 'Protein Structure Prediction Using Deep Learning'. The 'Abstract' field for these must either be completely empty or contain a genuine scientific abstract.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Zotero application GUI to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Zotero application window open and being interacted with, rather than just a text editor or terminal.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the UI by directly modifying the Zotero SQLite database via terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal windows should not show direct SQLite queries (e.g., 'UPDATE items SET...') modifying the zotero.sqlite file.

integrity.description: The metadata changes are genuinely reflected in the Zotero interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Zotero item pane or main library list visually displays the corrected years, names, and abstracts without error dialogs.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verified correct publication years: Fire & Mello (RNA interference) = 1998; Zhang lab (CRISPR-Cas9) = 2013; Lancaster et al. (Cerebral organoids) = 2013. Verified correct author names (First Last): Craig L. Peterson (Chromatin Remodeling), Alan R. Saltiel (Insulin signaling), George A. Calin (MicroRNAs in Cancer), Noboru Mizushima (Autophagy). Abstract fields for papers on Telomere Dynamics, Antibiotic Resistance, Gut Microbiome, Immune Checkpoint Blockade, and Protein Structure Prediction must not contain placeholder text (they must be empty or contain a real abstract).
